title: Coverage baseline
description: Locked snapshot of per-file test coverage that audit_coverage_budget.py uses as the no-regression contract. One baseline per minor release, committed under data/baselines/coverage-vX.Y.Z.json.

$schema.description: Repo-relative path to this schema file (for editor validation).

version.description: Semver of the release this baseline was captured against. Mirrors VERSION at the time of capture.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (e.g. ``2026-05-09T09:01:06Z``) at the moment audit_coverage_budget.py --print-baseline was run.

git_head.description: Full 40-char SHA of the HEAD commit when the baseline was captured. Lets reviewers replay the same coverage measurement against the same source.

totals.description: Repo-wide rollup. Used as a one-glance sanity check; the gate itself runs per-file.

tier_1_modules.description: tools/build/ — the build-pipeline core. Strictest ratchet; audit_coverage_budget.py fails CI on any per-file regression beyond tolerance.

tier_2_modules.description: scripts/audit_*.py + named additions (equipment_lib, build_es, build_ta, generate_recommender_app). Same ratchet rules as tier-1 but a lower new-file floor.

tier_3_exempt.description: Files under scripts/ that are intentionally untested (one-shot uplift / migration / ingest helpers). Listed for transparency; not measured.

percent_covered.description: Percent of statements covered. Rounded to 2 decimals at capture time so baseline diffs stay readable.
